movie.title: Ghost Board
movie.originalTitle: กล่องผีสุ่มวิญญาณ
movie.overview: A group of friends stumbles upon an ancient board game hidden in a remote temple. Once the die is cast, a vengeful spirit is unleashed, turning the game into a deadly trap. To survive, they must figure out how to end it before they become its next victims.

aiEnrichment.summary_one_sentence: A group of friends unleashes a vengeful spirit from an ancient board game in a remote temple and must end the deadly game to survive.
aiEnrichment.summary_short: A group of friends discovers an ancient board game hidden in a remote temple. When they cast the die, a vengeful spirit is released and the game becomes a deadly trap. They must uncover how to end the game before they are killed one by one. The situation grows more dangerous as the spirit hunts them through the temple.
aiEnrichment.summary_long: A group of friends travels to a remote temple seeking adventure and stumbles upon an ancient board game concealed within its ruins. Curious and unaware of the danger, they begin to play, and the moment the die is cast, a vengeful spirit is unleashed from the game. The spirit quickly turns the playful activity into a deadly trap, targeting each player with supernatural violence. As friends start disappearing or dying, the remaining survivors realize the game will not stop until it claims them all. Panic sets in as they search the temple for clues about the game's origin and the spirit's curse. They learn through fragmented inscriptions that the game was sealed away centuries ago to contain the malicious entity. The group attempts multiple strategies to break the connection, but the spirit adapts and grows stronger with each turn. Tensions rise and alliances fracture under the pressure of imminent death. In the end, the survivors must solve the game's hidden rule to close the portal and banish the spirit before none remain. Only by sacrificing their desire to win can they hope to escape the temple alive.
aiEnrichment.synopsis: Ghost Board follows a group of friends who discover a mysterious ancient board game in a remote temple. Upon playing it, they accidentally release a vengeful spirit that turns the game into a lethal supernatural ordeal. Trapped and hunted, the friends must work together to understand the game's rules and find a way to end it before they are all claimed by the spirit. The film blends horror, thriller, and drama as it explores friendship, fear, and survival against an unseen evil.

story_structure.climax: The group confronts the spirit in a final, desperate attempt to break the game's deadly hold and stop the killings.
story_structure.conflict: After casting the die, a vengeful spirit is released from the game, transforming it into a lethal trap that threatens the group's lives.
story_structure.resolution: They manage to end the game and survive, though changed by the ordeal, and the spirit is sealed away once more.
story_structure.introduction: A group of friends discovers an ancient board game concealed within a remote temple during their exploration.
story_structure.risingAction: As the game progresses, the friends face escalating supernatural dangers and realize they must uncover the rules to end the game before it claims them one by one.
